Figure 6

Siyuan Huang

2025-12-07

Load libraries

library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(cowplot)
library(ggplot2)
library(lemon)
library(showtext)
library(Rmisc)
library(gridExtra)
library(grid)
library(gtable)
library(patchwork)

Font and theme settings

showtext_auto()
showtext_opts(dpi = 600)

# Register the Arial font if present (its path varies by OS); otherwise fall
# back to the default sans-serif family so figures render on any machine.
arial_path <- c(
  "C:/Windows/Fonts/arial.ttf",                        # Windows
  "/Library/Fonts/Arial.ttf",                          # macOS
  "/usr/share/fonts/truetype/msttcorefonts/Arial.ttf"  # Linux (msttcorefonts)
)
arial_path <- arial_path[file.exists(arial_path)][1]

if (!is.na(arial_path)) {
  font_add(family = "Arial", regular = arial_path)
  theme_set(theme_classic(base_family = "Arial"))
} else {
  theme_set(theme_classic())
}

Load utilities and import data

source("plot_util_test.R")

data_raw <- read_excel("data/Plot_Data.xlsx")

data_filtered <- data_raw[data_raw$stage1_task0_accuracy < 0.9, ]

Panel (a): Confidence across stages (follow-up completers)

data_filtered1 <- data_filtered[, c(
  "Label",
  "stage1_task0_confidence",
  "stage2_task0_confidence",
  "stage3_task0_confidence",
  "follow_task0_confidence"
)]

data_filtered2 <- data_filtered1[!is.na(data_filtered1$follow_task0_confidence), ]

df_21 <- data_preprocessing(
  data = data_filtered1,
  label_col = c(
    "Label",
    "stage1_task0_confidence",
    "stage2_task0_confidence",
    "stage3_task0_confidence",
    "follow_task0_confidence"
  ),
  new_columns_name = c("Label", "Stage1", "Stage2", "Stage3", "Follow"),
  data_columns = c("Stage1", "Stage2", "Stage3", "Follow"),
  one_names_values = "Phase",
  one_values_values = "Confidence",
  after_columns_name = c(
    "Stage 1: Independent work",
    "Stage 2: LLM-guided practice",
    "Stage 3: LLM-provided answers",
    "Follow-up"
  ),
  phase_subtitle_name = c(
    "Independent \n work",
    "LLM-guided \n practice",
    "LLM-provided \n answers",
    ""
  ),
  phase_short_name = c("Stage 1", "Stage 2", "Stage 3", "Follow-up"),
  groupby_col = "Label"
)

df_21_1 <- df_21$stats_summary %>%
  mutate(
    Phase_short = factor(Phase_short, levels = c("Stage 1", "Stage 2", "Stage 3", "Follow-up")),
    Label = factor(Label, levels = c("AI", "AI Human", "Human")),
    x_plot = as.numeric(Phase_short),
    mean_pct = mean,
    ci_pct = ci95
  )

fig21 <- ggplot(df_21_1, aes(x = x_plot, y = mean_pct)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 3, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50", linewidth = 0.5) +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = 4, y = 3, label = "Neutral",
    vjust = -0.55, hjust = 0.55,
    size = 13 / .pt, color = "black"
  ) +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = 4.05, y = 4.8, label = "Delayed test",
    vjust = 0, hjust = 0.7,
    size = 13 / .pt, color = "black"
  ) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 3.5, color = "gray50", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = mean_pct - ci_pct, ymax = mean_pct + ci_pct, color = Label),
    width = 0, size = 0.5, alpha = 0.75, show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  geom_line(
    aes(group = Label, color = Label),
    size = 0.5, alpha = 0.75, show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  geom_point(aes(fill = Label, color = Label, shape = Label), size = 4, stroke = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("AI" = "#0173B2", "AI Human" = "#029E73", "Human" = "#DE8F05"),
    labels = c("AI" = "AI", "AI Human" = "AI + Human", "Human" = "Human")
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("AI" = "#0173B2", "AI Human" = "#029E73", "Human" = "#DE8F05"),
    labels = c("AI" = "AI", "AI Human" = "AI + Human", "Human" = "Human")
  ) +
  scale_shape_manual(
    values = c("AI" = 21, "AI Human" = 22, "Human" = 24),
    labels = c("AI" = "AI", "AI Human" = "AI + Human", "Human" = "Human")
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = 1:4,
    labels = c("Stage 1", "Stage 2", "Stage 3", "Follow-up")
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(1, 5, 1), limits = c(1, 5), expand = c(0, 0)) +
  geom_segment(x = 1, xend = 2, y = 1, yend = 1, color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_segment(x = 2, xend = 3, y = 1, yend = 1, color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_segment(x = 3, xend = 4, y = 1, yend = 1, color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) +
  labs(
    title = expression(atop(
      bold("Self-reported confidence in own answer across stages"),
      bold("(Stage 1-3 ") * bolditalic(N) * bold(" = 175; Follow-up ") * bolditalic(N) * bold(" = 84)")
    )),
    x = NULL,
    y = "Confidence in answer"
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(1, 5), clip = "off") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.line.x = element_blank(),
    text = element_text(family = "sans"),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 13, face = "bold"),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(8, "points"),
    axis.ticks = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.5),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.5),
    axis.title.x = element_text(face = "plain", size = 13, margin = margin(t = 10)),
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = "plain", size = 13, margin = margin(r = 10)),
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "plain", size = 13, color = "black", margin = margin(t = 7)),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "plain", size = 13, color = "black", margin = margin(r = 7)),
    legend.position = c(0.16, 0.90),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
    legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
    legend.key = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 13),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_blank()
  ) +
  guides(
    color = guide_legend(
      title = NULL,
      override.aes = list(
        fill = c("AI" = "#0173B2", "AI Human" = "#029E73", "Human" = "#DE8F05"),
        linetype = "solid",
        color = c("AI" = "#0173B2", "AI Human" = "#029E73", "Human" = "#DE8F05"),
        shape = c("AI" = 21, "AI Human" = 22, "Human" = 24),
        size = 4,
        stroke = 1
      )
    ),
    shape = "none",
    fill = "none"
  )

print(fig21)

Panel (b): Confidence attrition check (all participants vs follow-up completers)

df_22_1 <- data_preprocessing(
  data = data_filtered2,
  label_col = c("stage1_task0_confidence", "stage2_task0_confidence", "stage3_task0_confidence"),
  new_columns_name = c("Stage1", "Stage2", "Stage3"),
  data_columns = c("Stage1", "Stage2", "Stage3"),
  one_names_values = "Phase",
  one_values_values = "Confidence",
  after_columns_name = c(
    "Stage 1: Independent work",
    "Stage 2: LLM-guided practice",
    "Stage 3: LLM-provided answers"
  ),
  phase_subtitle_name = c("Independent \n work", "LLM-guided \n practice", "LLM-provided \n answers"),
  phase_short_name = c("Stage 1", "Stage 2", "Stage 3"),
  groupby_col = NULL
)

df_22_2 <- data_preprocessing(
  data = data_filtered,
  label_col = c("stage1_task0_confidence", "stage2_task0_confidence", "stage3_task0_confidence"),
  new_columns_name = c("Stage1", "Stage2", "Stage3"),
  data_columns = c("Stage1", "Stage2", "Stage3"),
  one_names_values = "Phase",
  one_values_values = "Confidence",
  after_columns_name = c(
    "Stage 1: Independent work",
    "Stage 2: LLM-guided practice",
    "Stage 3: LLM-provided answers"
  ),
  phase_subtitle_name = c("Independent \n work", "LLM-guided \n practice", "LLM-provided \n answers"),
  phase_short_name = c("Stage 1", "Stage 2", "Stage 3"),
  groupby_col = NULL
)

df_22_1_plot <- df_22_1$stats_summary
df_22_2_plot <- df_22_2$stats_summary

df_22_2_plot$Label <- "All participants"
df_22_1_plot$Label <- "Follow-up completers"

df_combined <- bind_rows(df_22_1_plot, df_22_2_plot) %>%
  mutate(
    Phase_short = factor(Phase_short, levels = c("Stage 1", "Stage 2", "Stage 3")),
    Label = factor(Label, levels = c("All participants", "Follow-up completers")),
    x_plot = as.numeric(Phase_short),
    mean_pct = mean,
    ci_pct = ci95
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(x_plot))

fig22 <- ggplot(df_combined, aes(x = x_plot, y = mean_pct)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 3, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_line(aes(group = Label, linetype = Label), color = "black", size = 0.5, alpha = 1) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = mean_pct - ci_pct, ymax = mean_pct + ci_pct, group = Label),
    color = "black", width = 0, size = 0.5, alpha = 1
  ) +
  geom_point(aes(shape = Label, fill = Label), color = "black", size = 4, stroke = 1) +
  scale_shape_manual(
    values = c("All participants" = 21, "Follow-up completers" = 21),
    labels = expression(
      "All participants (" * italic(N) * " = 175)",
      "Follow-up completers (" * italic(N) * " = 84)"
    )
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("All participants" = "black", "Follow-up completers" = "white"),
    labels = expression(
      "All participants (" * italic(N) * " = 175)",
      "Follow-up completers (" * italic(N) * " = 84)"
    )
  ) +
  scale_linetype_manual(
    values = c("All participants" = "solid", "Follow-up completers" = "dashed"),
    labels = expression(
      "All participants (" * italic(N) * " = 175)",
      "Follow-up completers (" * italic(N) * " = 84)"
    )
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = 1:3,
    labels = c("Stage 1", "Stage 2", "Stage 3"),
    expand = c(0.05, 0.05)
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(1, 5, 1), limits = c(1, 5), expand = c(0, 0)) +
  geom_segment(x = 1, xend = 2, y = 1, yend = 1, color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_segment(x = 2, xend = 3, y = 1, yend = 1, color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) +
  labs(
    title = "Attrition check (collapsed across labels)",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Confidence in answer"
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(1, 5), clip = "off") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.line.x = element_blank(),
    text = element_text(family = "sans"),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 13, face = "bold"),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(8, "points"),
    axis.ticks = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.5),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.5),
    axis.title.x = element_text(face = "plain", size = 13, margin = margin(t = 10)),
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = "plain", size = 13, margin = margin(r = 10)),
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "plain", size = 13, color = "black", margin = margin(t = 7)),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "plain", size = 13, color = "black", margin = margin(r = 7)),
    legend.position = c(0.32, 0.94),
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
    legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
    legend.key = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 13),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_blank()
  ) +
  guides(
    shape = guide_legend(override.aes = list(linetype = NA, size = 4, stroke = 1)),
    fill = guide_legend(override.aes = list(linetype = NA, size = 4, stroke = 1)),
    linetype = guide_legend(override.aes = list(linetype = NA, size = 4, stroke = 1))
  )

print(fig22)

Panel (c): Willingness to accept materials (Stage 2 vs Stage 3)

data_filtered3_1 <- data_filtered[, c(
  "Label",
  "stage2_task0_willing",
  "stage3_task0_willing",
  "follow_AI_Self_Efficacy"
)]

data_filtered3_1_1 <- data_filtered3_1[!is.na(data_filtered3_1$follow_AI_Self_Efficacy), ]

data_filtered_3_1 <- data_filtered3_1_1[, c("Label", "stage2_task0_willing", "stage3_task0_willing")]

res_data_new <- data_preprocessing(
  data = data_filtered_3_1,
  label_col = c("Label", "stage2_task0_willing", "stage3_task0_willing"),
  new_columns_name = c("Label", "Stage 2", "Stage 3"),
  data_columns = c("Stage 2", "Stage 3"),
  one_names_values = "Phase",
  one_values_values = "Rating",
  after_columns_name = c("Stage 2", "Stage 3"),
  phase_subtitle_name = c("", ""),
  phase_short_name = c("Stage 2", "Stage 3"),
  groupby_col = "Label"
)

compters_only <- res_data_new$stats_summary

data23_1 <- data_filtered[, c("ID", "Label", "stage2_task0_willing")]
colnames(data23_1) <- c("ID", "Label", "Willing")
data23_1$Phase <- "Stage 2"

data23_2 <- data_filtered[, c("ID", "Label", "stage3_task0_willing")]
colnames(data23_2) <- c("ID", "Label", "Willing")
data23_2$Phase <- "Stage 3"

my_data <- bind_rows(data23_1, data23_2)
my_data$Phase <- factor(my_data$Phase, levels = c("Stage 2", "Stage 3"))
my_data$Label <- factor(my_data$Label, levels = c("AI", "AI Human", "Human"))

label_map <- c("AI" = "AI", "AI Human" = "AI + Human", "Human" = "Human")

fig23 <- ggplot(my_data, aes(x = Phase, y = Willing)) +
  geom_line(aes(group = ID), color = "gray80", alpha = 0.5, size = 0.5) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 3, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50", linewidth = 0.5) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "line", linetype = "solid", aes(group = 1, color = Label), size = 0.5) +
  stat_summary(fun.data = mean_cl_normal, geom = "errorbar", aes(color = Label), width = 0, size = 0.5) +
  geom_errorbar(
    data = compters_only,
    aes(y = mean, ymin = mean - ci95, ymax = mean + ci95, color = Label),
    width = 0, size = 0.5
  ) +
  geom_line(
    data = compters_only,
    aes(y = mean, group = Label, color = Label),
    linetype = "dashed",
    size = 0.5,
    alpha = 0.8
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = compters_only,
    aes(y = mean, color = Label),
    fill = "white",
    shape = 21, stroke = 1, size = 4
  ) +
  stat_summary(
    fun = mean, geom = "point",
    shape = 21, stroke = 1,
    aes(color = Label, fill = Label), size = 4
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~Label, nrow = 1, labeller = as_labeller(label_map)) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("AI" = "#0173B2", "AI Human" = "#029E73", "Human" = "#DE8F05"),
    labels = c("AI" = "AI", "AI Human" = "AI + Human", "Human" = "Human")
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("AI" = "#0173B2", "AI Human" = "#029E73", "Human" = "#DE8F05"),
    labels = c("AI" = "AI", "AI Human" = "AI + Human", "Human" = "Human")
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(1, 5), clip = "off") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Willingness to accept materials") +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(1, 5), breaks = seq(1, 5, 1), expand = c(0, 0)) +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 13, vjust = 1.5),
    panel.spacing = unit(-1, "cm"),
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.ticks.length = unit(8, "points"),
    axis.ticks = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.5),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.5),
    axis.title.x = element_text(face = "plain", size = 13, margin = margin(t = 10)),
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = "plain", size = 13, margin = margin(r = 10)),
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "plain", size = 13, color = "black", margin = margin(t = 7), angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "plain", size = 13, color = "black", margin = margin(r = 7))
  ) +
  coord_capped_cart(bottom = capped_horizontal(), left = capped_vertical())

print(fig23)

Panel (d): Usefulness of materials (Stage 2 vs Stage 3)

data_filtered3_1 <- data_filtered[, c(
  "Label",
  "stage2_task0_useful",
  "stage3_task0_useful",
  "follow_AI_Self_Efficacy"
)]

data_filtered3_1_1 <- data_filtered3_1[!is.na(data_filtered3_1$follow_AI_Self_Efficacy), ]

data_filtered_3_1 <- data_filtered3_1_1[, c("Label", "stage2_task0_useful", "stage3_task0_useful")]

res_data_new <- data_preprocessing(
  data = data_filtered_3_1,
  label_col = c("Label", "stage2_task0_useful", "stage3_task0_useful"),
  new_columns_name = c("Label", "Stage 2", "Stage 3"),
  data_columns = c("Stage 2", "Stage 3"),
  one_names_values = "Phase",
  one_values_values = "Rating",
  after_columns_name = c("Stage 2", "Stage 3"),
  phase_subtitle_name = c("", ""),
  phase_short_name = c("Stage 2", "Stage 3"),
  groupby_col = "Label"
)

compters_only2 <- res_data_new$stats_summary

data24_1 <- data_filtered[, c("ID", "Label", "stage2_task0_useful")]
colnames(data24_1) <- c("ID", "Label", "Useful")
data24_1$Phase <- "Stage 2"

data24_2 <- data_filtered[, c("ID", "Label", "stage3_task0_useful")]
colnames(data24_2) <- c("ID", "Label", "Useful")
data24_2$Phase <- "Stage 3"

my_data2 <- bind_rows(data24_1, data24_2)
my_data2$Phase <- factor(my_data2$Phase, levels = c("Stage 2", "Stage 3"))
my_data2$Label <- factor(my_data2$Label, levels = c("AI", "AI Human", "Human"))

fig24 <- ggplot(my_data2, aes(x = Phase, y = Useful)) +
  geom_line(aes(group = ID), color = "gray80", alpha = 0.5, size = 0.5) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 3, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50", linewidth = 0.5) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "line", linetype = "solid", aes(group = 1, color = Label), size = 0.5) +
  stat_summary(fun.data = mean_cl_normal, geom = "errorbar", aes(color = Label), width = 0, size = 0.5) +
  geom_errorbar(
    data = compters_only2,
    aes(y = mean, ymin = mean - ci95, ymax = mean + ci95, color = Label),
    width = 0, size = 0.5
  ) +
  geom_line(
    data = compters_only2,
    aes(y = mean, group = Label, color = Label),
    linetype = "dashed",
    size = 0.5,
    alpha = 0.8
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = compters_only2,
    aes(y = mean, color = Label),
    fill = "white",
    shape = 21, stroke = 1, size = 4
  ) +
  stat_summary(
    fun = mean, geom = "point",
    shape = 21, stroke = 1,
    aes(color = Label, fill = Label), size = 4
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~Label, nrow = 1, labeller = as_labeller(label_map)) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("AI" = "#0173B2", "AI Human" = "#029E73", "Human" = "#DE8F05"),
    labels = c("AI" = "AI", "AI Human" = "AI + Human", "Human" = "Human")
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("AI" = "#0173B2", "AI Human" = "#029E73", "Human" = "#DE8F05"),
    labels = c("AI" = "AI", "AI Human" = "AI + Human", "Human" = "Human")
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Usefulness of materials") +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(1, 5), breaks = seq(1, 5, 1), expand = c(0, 0)) +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 13, vjust = 1.5),
    panel.spacing = unit(-1, "cm"),
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.ticks.length = unit(8, "points"),
    axis.ticks = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.5),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.5),
    axis.title.x = element_text(face = "plain", size = 13, margin = margin(t = 10)),
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = "plain", size = 13, margin = margin(r = 10)),
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "plain", size = 13, color = "black", margin = margin(t = 7), angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "plain", size = 13, color = "black", margin = margin(r = 7))
  ) +
  coord_capped_cart(bottom = capped_horizontal(), left = capped_vertical())

print(fig24)

P-value tables

p_values_c <- data.frame(
  All = "Completers",
  `italic(P)~'= 0.024'` = "italic(P)~'= 0.165'",
  `italic(P)~'= 0.100'` = "italic(P)~'= 0.104'",
  `italic(P)~'= 0.359'` = "italic(P)~'= 0.900'",
  check.names = FALSE,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

p_values_d <- data.frame(
  ` ` = " ",
  `italic(P)~'= 0.023'` = "italic(P)~'= 0.264'",
  `italic(P)~'= 0.069'` = "italic(P)~'= 0.014'",
  `italic(P)~'= 0.810'` = "italic(P)~'= 0.268'",
  check.names = FALSE,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

apa_theme <- ttheme_minimal(
  base_size = 13,
  core = list(
    fg_params = list(hjust = 0.5, x = 0.5, parse = TRUE),
    bg_params = list(fill = "white"),
    padding = unit(c(1, 6), "mm")
  ),
  colhead = list(
    fg_params = list(hjust = 0.5, x = 0.5, parse = TRUE),
    bg_params = list(fill = "white"),
    padding = unit(c(1, 8), "mm")
  )
)

table_c <- tableGrob(p_values_c, rows = NULL, theme = apa_theme)
table_d <- tableGrob(p_values_d, rows = NULL, theme = apa_theme)

add_apa_lines <- function(table) {
  table <- gtable_add_grob(
    table,
    grobs = segmentsGrob(
      y1 = unit(1, "npc"), y0 = unit(1, "npc"),
      x0 = unit(0.22, "npc"), x1 = unit(0.95, "npc"),
      gp = gpar(lwd = 2.5)
    ),
    t = 1, b = 1, l = 1, r = ncol(table)
  )

  table <- gtable_add_grob(
    table,
    grobs = segmentsGrob(
      y1 = unit(0, "npc"), y0 = unit(0, "npc"),
      x0 = unit(0.22, "npc"), x1 = unit(0.95, "npc"),
      gp = gpar(lwd = 2.5)
    ),
    t = nrow(table), b = nrow(table), l = 1, r = ncol(table)
  )

  table
}

left_align_first_col <- function(tbl, pad_rel = 0.02) {
  idx <- which(tbl$layout$l == 1)

  for (i in idx) {
    g <- tbl$grobs[[i]]

    if (inherits(g, "text") || inherits(g, "titleGrob")) {
      if (!is.null(g$x)) g$x <- unit(pad_rel, "npc")
      if (!is.null(g$hjust)) g$hjust <- 0
    } else if (inherits(g, "gTree")) {
      if (!is.null(g$children) && length(g$children) > 0) {
        for (j in seq_along(g$children)) {
          child <- g$children[[j]]
          if (!is.null(child$x)) child$x <- unit(pad_rel, "npc")
          if (!is.null(child$hjust)) child$hjust <- 0
          g$children[[j]] <- child
        }
      }
    }

    tbl$grobs[[i]] <- g
  }

  tbl
}

table_c <- add_apa_lines(table_c)
table_d <- add_apa_lines(table_d)

col_widths <- unit.c(
  unit(0.67, "null"),
  unit(1, "null"),
  unit(1, "null"),
  unit(1, "null")
)

table_c$widths <- col_widths
table_d$widths <- col_widths

table_c <- left_align_first_col(table_c, pad_rel = 0)
table_d <- left_align_first_col(table_d, pad_rel = 0)
grid.newpage()
grid.draw(table_c)

grid.newpage()
grid.draw(table_d)

Combine panels and save figure

layout <- "
AAABBB
CCCDDD
"

tag_theme <- theme(
  plot.tag = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
  plot.tag.position = c(0.01, 0.99)
)

fig21 <- fig21 + labs(tag = "a.") + tag_theme
fig22 <- fig22 + labs(tag = "b.") + tag_theme
fig23 <- fig23 + labs(tag = "c.") + tag_theme
fig24 <- fig24 + labs(tag = "d.") + tag_theme

common_margin <- margin(t = 5.5, r = 5.5, b = 5.5, l = 5.5)

fig23 <- fig23 + theme(plot.margin = common_margin)
fig24 <- fig24 + theme(plot.margin = common_margin)

table_c_plot <- ggdraw() +
  draw_grob(table_c, x = 0, hjust = 0.13, width = 1.1) +
  theme(plot.margin = common_margin)

table_d_plot <- ggdraw() +
  draw_grob(table_d, x = 0, hjust = 0.13, width = 1.1) +
  theme(plot.margin = common_margin)

panel_c <- fig23 / table_c_plot + plot_layout(heights = c(1, 0.5))
panel_d <- fig24 / table_d_plot + plot_layout(heights = c(1, 0.5))

combined_fig2 <- (fig21 + fig22 + panel_c + panel_d) +
  plot_layout(design = layout, heights = c(1, 1.5)) +
  theme(plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA))

print(combined_fig2)

ggsave("figure/Figure_Study2_2.png", combined_fig2, width = 11, height = 10, dpi = 600, bg = "white")
ggsave("figure/Figure_Study2_2.pdf", combined_fig2, width = 11, height = 10, dpi = 600, bg = "white")
ggsave("figure/Figure_Study2_2.svg", combined_fig2, width = 11, height = 10, bg = "white")
